testcase.name: test_ai_guards_status_returns_all_guards

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing guard: ai_journal_block assert 'ai_journal_block' in {'greeks_filter': {'description': 'Options Greeks & IV analysis filters bad options', 'enabled': True}, 'kelly_sizing': {'consecutive_losses': 0, 'description': 'AI decides how much to invest per trade', 'enabled': True, 'mode': 'conservative', ...}, 'market_regime_filter': {'blocked': False, 'confidence': 0, 'current_regime': 'UNKNOWN', 'enabled': True}, 'max_daily_loss': {'blocked': False, 'enabled': True, 'limit': 10000, 'today_loss': 0}, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_v1500_telegram_guard_fixes.py:45: in test_ai_guards_status_returns_all_guards assert guard in guards, f"Missing guard: {guard}" E AssertionError: Missing guard: ai_journal_block E assert 'ai_journal_block' in {'greeks_filter': {'description': 'Options Greeks & IV analysis filters bad options', 'enabled': True}, 'kelly_sizing': {'consecutive_losses': 0, 'description': 'AI decides how much to invest per trade', 'enabled': True, 'mode': 'conservative', ...}, 'market_regime_filter': {'blocked': False, 'confidence': 0, 'current_regime': 'UNKNOWN', 'enabled': True}, 'max_daily_loss': {'blocked': False, 'enabled': True, 'limit': 10000, 'today_loss': 0}, ...}
